name: backend-cybersecurity-portfolio
description: Monorepo de portafolio con Astro y Express

scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix frontend & npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.build: export NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node --check backend/src/server.js
scripts.build:hostinger: export NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
